'''dazhuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickenichite|nickenichite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickenichite|nickenichite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dazhuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzhithith|dæzhithith]] || [[word:dæzhithij|dæzhithij]] || [[word:dæzhithish|dæzhithish]] || [[word:dæzhithi|dæzhithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhuzhuthuth|dazhuzhuthuth]] || [[word:dazhuzhuthuj|dazhuzhuthuj]] || [[word:dazhuzhuthush|dazhuzhuthush]] || [[word:dazhuzhuthu|dazhuzhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhuthuth|dazhuthuth]] || [[word:dazhuthuj|dazhuthuj]] || [[word:dazhuthush|dazhuthush]] || [[word:dazhuthu|dazhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhufthuth|dazhufthuth]] || [[word:dazhufthuj|dazhufthuj]] || [[word:dazhufthush|dazhufthush]] || [[word:dazhufthuf|dazhufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazhuthuthu|dazhuthuthu]] || [[word:dazhuthuju|dazhuthuju]] || [[word:dazhuthushu|dazhuthushu]] || [[word:dazhuthuku|dazhuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazhuthuth|dazhuthuth]] || [[word:dazhuthuj|dazhuthuj]] || [[word:dazhuthush|dazhuthush]] || [[word:dazhuthu|dazhuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazhuthuthul|dazhuthuthul]] || [[word:dazhuthujul|dazhuthujul]] || [[word:dazhuthushul|dazhuthushul]] || [[word:dazhuthukul|dazhuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazhuthuthuthu|dazhuthuthuthu]] || [[word:dazhuthujuju|dazhuthujuju]] || [[word:dazhuthushushu|dazhuthushushu]] || [[word:dazhuthuku|dazhuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazhuthuthun|dazhuthuthun]] || [[word:dazhuthujun|dazhuthujun]] || [[word:dazhuthushun|dazhuthushun]] || [[word:dazhuthukun|dazhuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazhuthuthuoro|dazhuthuthuoro]] || [[word:dazhuthujuoro|dazhuthujuoro]] || [[word:dazhuthushuoro|dazhuthushuoro]] || [[word:dazhuthukuoro|dazhuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
